title: Córdoba, Andalusia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Córdoba, Andalusia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Córdoba is a city in Andalusia with a population of 326,000. A UNESCO World Heritage city with the breathtaking Mezquita mosque-cathedral and a beautifully preserved Jewish Quarter.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
